nodes.title: arch identity score image 2 vs output
arch type + Save now to prompt library (disabled in queue)
widgets_values: Using image 1 as the source composition and image 2 as the reference, edit the source image while preserving the source framing, lighting direction, camera perspective, background structure, and output aspect ratio. Borrow only the intended subject, identity, outfit, pose, or style details from the reference image. Keep the result coherent, photorealistic, naturally integrated, and free of duplicated subjects or warped features.
low quality, blurry, distorted anatomy, duplicate subject, extra limbs, warped face, mismatched lighting, mismatched perspective, broken hands, text, watermark
Use Save now to update the prompt library. This node is disabled so it does not save every generation.

nodes.title: Arch workflow notes
widgets_values: Arch Flux 9B image-to-image reference workflow v2. Active Arch graph nodes: arch-Random Reference Image Source, arch-Reference Lane Pack, arch-Model + CLIP + VAE Loader, arch-Prompt Library, arch-Body Description, arch-Clothing Prompt, arch-Environment Prompt, arch-Snippet Library, arch-Prompt Combine, arch-Prompt LoRA Option Stack, arch-Create Extra MetaData, arch-Save Image With MetaData, and arch-OpenCV Identity Score. Edge-case/parked nodes: arch-Reverse Prompter, arch-Civitai Prompt Metadata Import, and arch-Save Prompt to Library. Source mode is auto: picked images use selection, otherwise the chosen folder/favorite is used. Extra source lanes are disabled until needed.
